13112.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
13112.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

13113.title: 40 Lessons In 80s Love!
13113.description: Fall in love with 40 of the most romantic hits of the 1980s!

13114.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1987!
13114.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1987!

13115.title: 80s Legends!
13115.description: From Madonna to Duran Duran, Whitney to Prince, we've got memorable song after song from the most amazing 80s legends - all in one playlist!

13116.title: Forever 80s
13116.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

13117.title: 80s Power Ballad Heaven!
13117.description: We've selected some of the most iconic 80s power ballads ever recorded to play for you right now on MTV 80s!

13118.title: ... So 80s!
13118.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
